$comment: Illustrative JSON projection of a Marque envelope. Wire format is canonical CBOR per schemas/cddl/envelope.cddl.

ciphertext.$comment: This blob is the MLS AppMessage encrypted to the recipient's current epoch key. Shown here decoded for illustration only.

plaintext_preview_for_illustration.alt_plaintext: Hi Bob — draft of the quarterly budget attached. Let me know if Thursday afternoon works for a walk-through.

blocks.content: Hi Bob — draft of the quarterly budget attached. Let me know if Thursday afternoon works for a walk-through.

blocks.prompt: Pick a Thursday slot for a walk-through

$comment_auth_mode: Because auth_mode is SIGNED (not QUALIFIED), this message does not carry a ProofEnvelope. See examples/proof-envelope.json for a Certified-tier example.
